sourceNotes: Ios 2026 amenities/access audit: Visit Greece, Discover Greece and Avanti Ios: Psathi has road access, few/basic facilities, nearby taverna and no sunbeds; it is favoured by windsurfers.
Phase 2 final South Aegean organized-service cleanup 2026-05-25: promoted existing verification source URLs to sourceUrls so organized-service evidence is directly traceable.

Strict Ios evidence pass 2026-05-29: Visit Greece and Avanti Ios support Psathi with road access, few/basic facilities, nearby taverna, no sunbeds, natural shade, and windsurfing-use context without importing live-condition claims.
